programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Borrowed Baby
programme.desc: A baby mysteriously appears in Mason's office along with a rare St. Christopher medal, which could help identify the baby's parents.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Conrad asks Matlock to defend Anne Johnson when she's charged with the murder of her cheating ex-boyfriend, Dwayne Meeks.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta police search for a killer and his girlfriend. But the case becomes personal when they take Althea and the grandson of one of the victims hostage.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Rose and Stanley plan to get married.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.sub-title: The Guns Of Cibola Blanca: Part 1
programme.desc: Doc and fellow stage passenger, Lyla, are captured by renegade Comancheros.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Grant Williams (best known for his star turn in the classic sci-fi film 'The Incredible Shrinking Man') is cast as Albert "Patch" Saunders, a self-deprecating loner living in a ghost town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself the unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for escape after he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "When children's dolls are found mutilated in her possession, passengers believe that Sara Proctor is either deranged or practicing witchcraft. Hale slowly arrives at the real story after Sara confides to him and Charlie's snooping."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.sub-title: To Buy Or Not To Buy
programme.desc: Roy thinks about buying a house, but delays too long. Responding to a fire, the firemen find two children trapped on the second floor. Two driving students are involved in a minor collision. Another traffic accident results in two injuries and a missing dog. A teenage epileptic is stranded on a concrete beam under a bridge.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is outraged when a sensationalistic war correspondent, Clayton Kibbee, reports irresponsible G.I. stunts as tales of military valor.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: An AWOL soldier, Nick Gillis, seeks sanctuary in the mess tent, after Father Mulcahy's service. At the same time, a special Sunday brunch is due to be served, following the donation of some eggs to the camp by a grateful farmer.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: The Tooth Shall Set You Free
programme.desc: Charles has a serious toothache, but hates the thought of having anything done about it. The doctors suspect prejudice when an inordinate number of black casualties are brought in from a single unit, led by Major Weems.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter sends for Sidney Freedman when he loses confidence in his surgical abilities, and Winchester loses patience with his bunkmates' sloppiness.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A news mogul swears revenge on Andy after he is arrested for what he deems a minor infraction. In retaliation, he sends a reporter to Mayberry to dig up whatever dirt she can on Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tries to help out his visiting cousin, Virgil. When Virgil makes one too many mistakes, Barney rails against him and storms out. Leave it to Andy to put things right.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Duke, Jed's bloodhound, becomes matchmaker for his master and a glamorous Frenchwoman.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter postpones his vacation until all his men pass their Private First Class exams. Gomer, unfortunately, is the only one to fail.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Klink fails a physical and gets combat duty at the Russian front.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan plans to detour the German bombers that normally attack London to a nearby Allied airbase.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Eunice has a flashback to when she first started dating her husband. Then, in The Hollow Hero, a guard refuses to the King and Queen inside without first receiving a popsicle.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Crimson Kiss
programme.desc: Fay Allison is getting married in a few days to Dane Grover. Her roommate, Anita Bonsal, is having a clandestine affair with a married man, Carver Clement. When Aunt Louise arrives early one morning to see Fay, she finds Fay and Anita both unconscious.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While aboard a commercial aircraft, a man believes he is seeing a gremlin on its wing.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A desperate man makes a deal with his defense lawyer in order to get acquitted.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man plots to get away from his wife for a while without her knowing.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Syndicate thugs have kidnapped an informer—or so they believe. Their victim is actually Peggy Fair, Mannix's secretary, which puts the detective on their trail.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A mob killer murders Cannon's client. But the killer is someone Cannon will never suspect, and that leaves him unprepared when he is accused of the crime.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby engages in a game of cat-and-mouse with a murderer who blames him for his jail time.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon help an employee rescue her kidnapped boss.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A new officer has been arrested for robbing a liquor store while on an undercover assignment.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Malloy pays tribute to Officer Tom Porter, who has recently fallen in the line of duty. Malloy recounts the close friendship they developed while training at the academy, as well as the moments where they crossed paths on duty, including the night of the officer's unfortunate demise.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and reed hunt down a suspect who has been bombing downtown storefronts. Then they report to a scuffle between two native americans at a bar that the bartender thinks may be a prelude to something a lot more serious.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony set sail on a couples cruise."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver comes to Ward for help on the night before a poetry assignment is due. This prompts Ward to totally take over the project and write the whole poem himself. Things get complicated when Beaver wins an award for the poem and Ward is faced with explaining the truth to Beaver's principal.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A school dance has Eddie swooning over his so-called "girl," Caroline. However, it's obvious Eddie has made up their relationship when Wally and him visit her and she instantly becomes smitten with Wally.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Counterfeit Crank
programme.desc: A crazy man, his dead nephew and a military base are tangled up in a confusing case for Mason.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Office pranks get out of hand—and may have led to murder. Matlock takes the case of Billy Finley, a recently fired office employee charged in the murder of another pink-slip recipient.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A copycat recreates a shocking unsolved murder from the past. Gillespie feels threatened after Ted Marcus suggests that Virgil should become the Chief. The situation becomes more tense after Virgil criticizes Parker and Bubba's actions.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A new company starts in the area and wants to sell wood to the Waltons.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.sub-title: The Guns Of Cibola Blanca: Part 2
programme.desc: Matt, Festus and Newly attempt to rescue Doc and Lyla from Shindrow's camp.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Wiley and Annie Kane arrive at the Ponderosa to work off their father's debt to Ben. It seems as though the elder Kane once swindled the Cartwright patriarch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Micah has an infamous outlaw, Charlie Gordo, in his jail waiting for the U.S. marshal from Denver to take Gordo to the Yuma prison for hanging. With the arrival of the stage, Micah finds that the lawman has been killed, and he has to look to his friends to defend the jail from Gordo's gang.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Duke Shannon stops in the town High Times and almost right away gets into a fight with, and accidentally kills, one of the gunmen who are essentially holding the town hostage. Then he finds his horse missing and ignores advise to leave."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Dr. Brackett rides along with a fire department helicopter crew. A boy causes trouble for the paramedics when he and his father are rescued after their camper has overturned in a canyon. Dr. Early treats a boy with spinal meningitis. The firemen rescue a man from a burning building.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Where There's A Will, There's A War
programme.desc: Hawkeye goes to help at an aid station, and under heavy shelling he draws up a will, leaving various items to his friends at the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester, Pierce and Hunnicutt find themselves in the sticky position of having to decide which enlisted men to recommend for promotion. For Winchester it could be a matter of life and death.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is the golden boy of the world press when he treats a celebrity prizefighter, "Gentleman" Joe Cavanaugh, who has a stroke at the 4077th. Father Mulcahy finds the news hard to take, as Cavanaugh was a hero of his.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After losing to the Marines once again, Colonel Potter wishes there was one sport the 4077th were any good at. When Klinger mentions he can bowl, the Colonel decides to have a bowling competition. Unfortunately, he and Klinger are the only two good bowlers in the camp, so BJ and Father Mulcahy are "recruited" to the team.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis has been writing letters to his brother and sister-in-law for some time on courthouse stationary. Because of this, they have come to believe that he is a deputy, something they expect to see on their upcoming visit.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: While walking through the woods, Opie meets Mr. McBeevee, a man who, Opie claims, "lives in the trees" and "jingles when he walks." Andy eventually learns that Opie's new friend works for the telephone company.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A confidence man tries to sell Jed the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park and the Hollywood Freeway.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is asked to be the best man at his friend's wedding. The night before the ceremony, he loses the ring.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After detecting an information leak in the area of Stalag 13, the Germans replace Klink with a more efficient officer, who Hogan sets up to take the fall.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tries to keep a French painting from ending up in Goering's art collection.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Easy Openers / Jacques Touteaux / Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: In Easy Openers, a hungry Carol tries to open her food locked in its container. Then, in Jacques Touteaux, Harvey describes the great feats Tim the diver will do, only he's too scared to do them. Finally, in Fortune Cookies, Carol suspects her best friend and husband are cheating together after a fortune cookie tells her.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Vagabond Vixen
programme.desc: Hollywood producer John Addison picks up an attractive young hitchhiker. Far from innocent, she turns out to be a blackmailer and a witness to a murder with which Addison is charged.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is given a stopwatch that allows him to halt time.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man stands on the ledge of a hotel while police try to talk to him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man witnesses a murder by two gangsters.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When a counterfeiter disappears, Mannix is up against Federal agents as well as criminals who want the man's flawless plates.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon tries to extract reporter Peggy Angel from a clever frame. Who is the real murderer, and why frame this particular person?

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates a murder at a prep-school.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Four bandits wearing red masks commit a series of robberies.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Two con men, posing as bank examiners, are bilking the elderly out of their life savings.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: In what would prove to be a very busy shift, Malloy and Reed search for a serial arsonist who spawns a copycat, settle a domestic dispute that results from a love triangle, rescue a man who wandered onto the ledge of a high rise and deal with a mentally ill man who is holding his wife at knife-point.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in Los Angeles, and Malloy and Reed track down a suspect who beat and mugged a rescue mission Santa, who later gets arrested himself. They also respond to an alcohol-related traffic accident that resulted in a fatality, help a penniless widow who has been detained for shoplifting and take part in the search for a young Native American child who wandered off into a mountainous area while her parents were asleep.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.sub-title: Fairy Godmother Of Dating To The Rescue
programme.desc: "Dating expert, Bela Gandhi, helps Toony with his love life."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward must make a decision when a conflict develops concerning which son to spend the weekend with. He can either go on a fishing trip with Wally or take Beaver on a father-son weekend. Thinking Ward is going to go fishing with Wally, Beaver makes up a wild story when his classmates start to tease him.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver makes a new friend in Chuey Varella but the boy only speaks Spanish. So Beaver asks Eddie, who has taken Spanish, for some help but Eddie plays a joke on Beaver by feeding him a sentence in Spanish which ultimately insults Chuey.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Ancient Romeo
programme.desc: Mason and Della go out for a night at the theatre to see 'Romeo and Juliet.' After the theatre suddenly goes dark during a dueling scene, the audience is horrified to discover that one of the actors has been killed with a sword when the lights are restored.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Office pranks get out of hand—and may have led to murder. Matlock takes the case of Billy Finley, a recently fired office employee charged in the murder of another pink-slip recipient.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs, Gillespie and Bubba pursue different leads in a bizarre murder case and the Chief realizes that the killer has plans for him.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: One of Mary Ellen's mountain patient dies, leaving his young teen to the helping hand

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Three cattle drivers find that railroads are forcing them out of business. Two of them turn to crime for a temporary fix.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben helps a convict win a parole only to have the man later become the chief suspect in a bank robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas' old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle—and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "An elderly couple and then a young girl become ill with typhoid fever on the wagon train. A young servant girl has attended to them all in isolation. One of the women on the train has an idea about the cause but no one wants to listen."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.sub-title: The Girl On The Balance Beam
programme.desc: A young girl is in a rush to go to the Olympics. The firemen rescue an actress trapped on a high wire at a studio, extricate a drunk driver from his car and attend to a burning train carrying ammonium nitrate.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Potter's attempts to assemble the crew for a family portrait are thwarted by a feud between bunkmates Pierce, Hunnicutt and Winchester. Things are not helped by the efforts of Margaret, Klinger and Mulcahy to bring the Swampmen back together.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger buys a goat, with the intention of getting rich by selling its milk. Then the goat eats the 4077th's $22,340 payroll, leaving paymaster Hawkeye holding the bag. Meanwhile, Charles also thinks he can make a killing when he sees an ancient vase.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret and her nursing staff are about to be inspected by Col. Bucholz. Meanwhile, Kellye is offended that Hawkeye is attracted to nurses besides her.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: It's Halloween at the 4077th, and the staff dons costumes and trades ghost stories. Father Mulcahy discovers a soldier alive that had been pronounced dead.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has begun seeing Peggy McMillan and he discovers she is from a wealthy family. The differences in their upbringings and education unsettle Andy, and he begins to doubt the ability of the relationship to endure.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and the new mayor are not on the same page in terms of Andy's style of managing Mayberry's sheriff's department.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed is made a bank vice president so he can compete in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sgt. Carter sets Gomer up with a blind date who thinks he is an oil millionaire.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan captures a German general to trade for an American general who dislikes Hogan.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan robs a bank to help pay for a map to German rocket installations.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Dual Pianos, a great pianist tries to calm his protege before they play together. Then in TV Commercials, Carol and the gang parody TV products, including Wish Detergent, Long Distance Phone Call, L'eggs Pantyhose, Buff-Up Toothpaste, and Second Cup of Coffee. Finally, in The Not So Eternal Triangle, a beautiful woman finds she can't compete with her frumpy husband's mistress.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Stuttering Bishop
programme.desc: Bishop Arthur Mallory is met in his hotel room by Wallace Lang, an associate of a wealthy man named Charles Burroughs. He is warned through physical violence to stop looking for Burroughs' granddaughter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Last Night Of A Jockey
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman commits murder while under hypnosis.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman confronts the wife of a rich man and tries to convince her to give her husband a divorce.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix's search for the source of a death threat takes him to a small town. Shortly after he arrives, he's framed for murder and imprisoned.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: When a plane carrying three million in negotiable securities vanishes, the insurance carrier hires Cannon to find out what happened to it.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An affair leads to an accidental murder.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An elderly apartment manager is found to have been beaten to death with a hammer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to figure out a pattern to a series of candy store hold-ups. The solution comes when they discover that there are two suspects.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed start the shift with a call to a liquor store robbery, where a fellow officer was shot but the owner of the store appears to be lying. Further investigation pushes the owner to admit one of the thieves was his brother and he was trying to protect him. In the meantime, they have a zoning issue with an elderly astrology reader followed by the report of a young boy asking a pharmacist questions about Seconal pills.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed and Malloy respond to a car rollover where a good samaritan makes matters worse. Afterward, they respond to several victims of a well-known family of seasonal home improvement con artists before finally catching them in the act. In the meantime, they search for a disgruntled ex-employee who is trying to sabotage his former workplace, and take a drunk driver off the street.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony discuss the evolution of dating."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: While watching Wally and his friends play baseball, Beaver is put in charge of looking after everyone's coats and watches. However, after the game is over Lumpy comes to claim his watch, but Beaver has no watch to give him.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver becomes good friends with a classmate, Linda Dennison. However, their relationship is blown out of proportion by Beaver's classmates who begin to tease him and goad him into insulting Linda to prove that she isn't his girl.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Promoter's Pillbox
programme.desc: Aspiring screenwriter Herbert Simms submits a teleplay to unscrupulous producer Charlie Corby, who passes the manuscript off as his own. Corby's scheme dies with him, however, when he is fatally whacked over the head with a whiskey bottle.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock and his daughter, Leanne, become mired in a case involving local politics and murder when the town mayor is assassinated and soon after that a judge is implicated in another death.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The murder of well-respected man turns up a shocking secret about his family.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy returns to New York with a new book - that is not good

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Farmer Jed Hockett (Harry Morgan) orders his three boys to go to town and return with prospective brides.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Juan Ortega claims he has a land grant which gives him ownership of the entire Nevada Territory.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction—a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sammy Davis Jr. stars as Tip Corey, son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "When four brothers are orphaned, no one on the train wants all four. Charlie is determined to find a home for the four together and even proposes to a spinster who wants the boys but turns him down so he looks for a husband for her."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Rampart's former Emergency! department head nurse tries to commit suicide; she is brought to Rampart, where she befriends a paraplegic child who almost drowned in a swimming pool. Also: a woman wrapped in plastic, a family suffering from carbon monoxide poisoning and a man pinned under a tank truck containing volatile fuel.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The Army tries to get a North Korean pilot to defect, and Charles gets a rude shock when he falls for a French nurse with a Bohemian past.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Tired of reminders about Trapper John's skill as a practical joker, B.J. bets Hawkeye he can prank everyone present.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye volunteers to deliver the eulogy for a dead nurse that he briefly dated, and belatedly discovers her deep feelings for him.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Posing the theory that people will believe in anything, Charles and Hawkeye start a rumor that Marilyn Monroe plans to visit the 4077th, which gets everyone excited. Meanwhile, B.J. feels responsible when he's unable to rescue a wounded soldier, and is less than impressed when he is presented with a Bronze Star.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Opie are left alone while Aunt Bee goes out of town. Peggy, Andy's new girlfriend, takes great delight in helping the boys handle things. Floyd warns Andy that Peggy is using her feminine wiles to "snare" him.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The mayor calls in an investigator from the state capital to help solve a string of cow thefts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An authority on American history finds evidence that Jed's ancestors preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer helps out a family by finding them shelter in a shack, unaware that the shack is the target of impending war games.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Praise The Fuhrer And Pass The Ammunition
programme.desc: Hogan and his men create chaos during staged war games that a ruthless Nazi colonel has scheduled near Stalag 13, replacing the exercise's fake explosives with live ammunition.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan resents having a lady scientist in charge of a mission to destroy a lab.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Hollow Hero, the Queen and King try to give their Hollow solider a blue pony. Then, in The Family, Eunice finds out her husband went into a massage parlor.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lost Last Act
programme.desc: Playwright Ernest Royce is found shot to death in the same manner as a character in one of his un-produced plays. The play deals with characters very close to real people and the real-life murder of a New York underworld figure.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Two old men face being evicted from their shack when they show no evidence of self-support.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Two women scheme to get rid of a rich old man.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.sub-title: A Small Favor For An Old Friend
programme.desc: Mannix loses a friend, a small time mob courier killed flying money to Mexico. The mobsters, certain Mannix stole their loot, come after the detective with a vengeance.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A murderer confined to a psychiatric hospital escapes. He's looking for his wife, whom he believes framed him for murder.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is used to smuggle narcotics.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: "Gannon goes undercover as a buyer in order to trap fur thieves"

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $200,000 worth of imperial jade is reported stolen. Friday and Gannon determine the burglary was an inside job.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Officer Reed loses a robbery suspect while in foot pursuit. Afterward, he and Malloy try to help a priest prevent bloodshed between rival hispanic gangs, and then respond to a battered wife whose husband is very familiar to the officers.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed drive up on a convenience store robbery in progress, which results in the suspects taking hostages. Later, they pull over a reckless driver who has just committed a heinous crime, learn about a new computer system designed to help them be more productive and finally thwart a group of serial burglars who use motorcycles.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony becomes Toopid, the Red Tuna of Love, for Valentine's Day."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Being Beaver's godmother, Aunt Martha sends him a gift of a ring that had once belonged to an uncle who was also named Theodore. June cautions Beaver that she doesn't want him taking it to school, but he sneaks off to school with it anyway. This leads to a confrontation between his peers that ends with him getting the ring stuck on his finger.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: When Eddie and some of his other friends brag about shaving, Wally decides it's time he try. After nicking his face, Ward tries to discourage him but this just leads Wally to continue to shave. When Ward catches him again, he scolds him right in front of Eddie which leads to Wally being made fun of.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lonely Eloper
programme.desc: Merle Telford is a naive and maladjusted young woman who is about to turn 21 and receive a substantial inheritance. She plans to run away from her guardians and elope with Danny Pierce as soon as she receives her money.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock and his daughter, Leanne, become mired in a case involving local politics and murder when the town mayor is assassinated and soon after that a judge is implicated in another death.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil is delighted when Matthew his former partner from Philadelphia comes to visit. But he soon learns his friend has another purpose for coming to Sparta. Althea is uncomfortable because she and Matthew were romantically involved before she met Virgil and she realizes that he is unwilling to accept the fact that she chose Virgil over him. Meanwhile the F.B.I. enlist Sparta P.D.'s aid in hiding a witness.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The family takes in a deaf girl who was abandoned by her mother.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt and lawman-turned-alcoholic Chauncey Demon go up against land baron Carl Ryker.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A mule skinner and his two sons are hired by Ben to transport nitroglycerin to California.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The pangs of first love are painful for Mark: the object of his affections has eyes for another.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: On the trail Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers. Bantry kills Ab Richards, and Len wants Micah to arrest Lucas for the murder. More problems ensue because of this "evil twin."

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "The Perez family is run out of town because people believe their daughter Juana is a witch. The family joins the wagon train, and after Juana's brother Felipe is mauled by a cat, the old world is pitted against the new world of medicine."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John receive commendations for bravery, but they can't remember the incident. A 94-year-old man breaks his ankle while dancing. Dr. Brackett treats a man who passed out in a dentist's chair. An injured mountaineer is stranded on a cliff.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and the crew surprise Colonel Potter with a party to commemorate Mildred's final payment on the couple's mortgage.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: With the camp facing prohibition and a severe medical supply shortage during another heat wave, Hawkeye resolves to lift morale by importing a racy new movie.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When an Olympic runner assigned to the 4077th fails to materialize, Father Mulcahy must save the camp's honor in a high-stakes footrace against the 8063rd.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: U.n., The Night And The Music
programme.desc: A United Nations delegation tours the 4077th—a Swede, a Hindu and a British officer— and each leaves a lasting effect on the men and women of the camp.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy shows up for a date with Peggy McMillan only to learn her old friend, Don, has arrived unexpectedly, leading to a string of misunderstandings and Barney's attempts at help.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's ability to be a lawman is put to the test with some peddlers and he fails. His confidence is shattered until Andy steps in behind the scenes and warns the peddlers of "Fife the Fierce."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Smith Standish is spending more time with the Clampetts, desperate to find out whether the family did in fact precede the ‘Mayflower.’ And Mrs. Drysdale is tortured with old-fashioned chores and a goat, which eats her hat, causing her to get very sad, making` Jane and Drysdale think she has been drinking.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is chosen to look after a new sentry dog. Gomer being Gomer, however, he promptly turns the trained guard dog into a pet.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Newkirk gets drafted into the German army while working on Hogan's plan to sabotage a ammunition factory.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is hiding a defecting German officer, and convinces Klink that the latter, who looks like Schultz, is really Hitler in disguise.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Pail, a woman discovers her psychiatrist is her old school bully. Then, in Stella Toddler, Carol plays an accident-prone woman trying to report that she's been mugged.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Bedeviled Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. David Craig discovers that tapes of conversations with his psychiatric patients are missing and being used for blackmail purposes. When the suspected thief and blackmailer, Mark Douglas, turns up murdered, Craig is charged with the crime.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Old Man In The Cave
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after nuclear war destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A rich man comes back to life to ensure that his funeral is not overly ornate.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A mother is shocked to learn that her daughter is having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When a courier is abducted while en route to the Japanese consulate, Mannix helps a Japanese investigator trying to find the man.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: The victim of a burglary hires Cannon. He's sure he knows who stole $50,000 from his wall safe and only needs Cannon to prove it. The problem is, the suspect was in jail at the time of the robbery!

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A murderer is sending valentines to his victims before killing them - and Betty may be the next target.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate bradley comes up with a plot to hide the beloved Hooterville Cannonball engine, scheduled to be scrapped by the C&W Railroad.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.sub-title: The President Who Came To Dinner: Part 1
programme.desc: After railroad president Norman P. Curtis breaks the throttle of the Cannonball, the folks of Hooterville are unable to attend Kate's annual jamboree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale is intent on getting the Clampetts to identify Colonel Foxhall and Emaline Fetty as dangerous criminals. Emaline is in hiding, but visits Jethro, tricking him into helping her hide from the police. The Clampetts mistake the officer that brought Foxhall as a criminal, and Foxhall gets away from the man holding him and hides in the Clampett mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly and Jethro both want a gorilla to help out around the house, so Jed asks Drysdale to get them one. Drysdale hires a man dressed as a gorilla to scare the Clampetts, but it fails. They put their new gorilla, Herby, to work doing chores and dress him in old clothes. Mr. Kelly, the man in the gorilla suit, wants out of the deal and gives his suit to Drysdale.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: I Yam Love Sick, Penny Antics, Snow Place Like Home
programme.desc: "Popeye plays sick to win Olive's attention., Popeye and Bluto run competing penny arcades., Popeye and Olive are carried away to the North Pole by a hurricane."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Carmen Get It, Senor Droopy, Quiet Please
programme.desc: "The antics of Tom and Jerry head to the opera house in a musical episode., Droopy is a bullfighter looking to win the hand of a real life senorita if he can win the competition., Spike warns Tom not to make any noise, so Jerry tries to."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: The Dizzy Acrobat, A Chilly Reception, Secret Agent Woody Woodpecker, The Case Of The Elephant's Trunk, Crazy Mixed Up Pup, Jolly Little Elves, The Dippy Diplomat
programme.desc: "Woody tries to sneak into the circus., Chilly threatens to replace Smedley in his cushy job as a ship mascot., Secret Agent Woody pursues the master criminal Louie the Litterbug., Inspector Willoughby tracks a rajah's kidnapped elephant., A man and his dog take on each other's attributes after an accident., A poor shoemaker and his wife invite a hungry elf in to share their donuts. He rewards them by recruiting some elf workers and making their shop a success., Woody impersonates a famous ambassador to steal food from a feast that Wally is holding in the diplomat's honor."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Foxy By Proxy, Life With Feathers, Naughty But Mice, Big House Bunny, You Ought To Be In Pictures, The Heckling Hare
programme.desc: "A pack of hunting dogs are after a fox, their intention to cut off his tail. Bugs puts on a very phony fox suit and gets the pack to chase him. He easily avoids the dogs, but the hunter is a little bit smarter and a lot harder to avoid. , A bird does everything he can to be eaten by Sylvester. , Sniffles befriends an electric razor but finds trouble as well., Bugs accidentally ends up in prison when he goes down the wrong rabbit hole. Yosemite Sam as the guard tries to catch him, mistaking Bugs for another inmate. , Daffy Duck tries to usurp Porky Pig's job through devious means in this wild blend of live action and animation. , A dopey dog goes sniffing down Bug's hole to find a rabbit. While he digs, Bugs comes out and watches. The bunny gives him a big kiss on the face and the dog chases after him in hot pursuit. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Bubbling Death
programme.desc: When Victor Freemantle, a dangerous revolutionary, steals the U.S. Constitution, agents James West and Artemus Gordon are sent by the government to the Panhandle Strip in Texas to recover it.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "While scouting in Wyoming territory, Duke is forced by outlaw Tom Tuesday to act as his guide to an important rendezvous in Ruby City, Idaho. Tuesday is going blind from a gunshot wound, and Duke is able to turn the tables on him."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Jarrod is guilt-ridden because he helped convict Keeno Nash of a crime he now knows Nash didn't commit. When he is released, Jarrod offers Nash help, despite the fact that he had threatened Jarrod’s life at the trial.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A series of seemingly random killings have the citizens of Dodge City in near panic, but Dillon believes they are part of a pattern in which Doc is slated to be the next target.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Jim Acton owns a prize mare that he's determined to keep--even when a judge awards the animal to another man in settlement of a debt.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark stop on the way to the county fair to deliver a message to Micah, who is on the trail escorting a prisoner scheduled to be hanged. Mark and Lucas recognize the prisoner, Mr. Renolds, as someone who saved Mark's life from a snake bite a few years back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A professional card player, John Keeler, has set up business in North Fork, but local Jesse Phillips claims that this tinhorn is a cheat. Lucas starts playing poker with Keeler to draw him out.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: When Rowdy spares Brock Quade's life, Brock gives Rowdy his fiancée, whom the ramrod must marry—or else!

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Ike Brennan hires Paladin to escort him and a wagonload of food and blankets into Indian country. The Indians are holding his wife hostage and he intends to trade what's in the wagon for her release. However, on the way there, Paladin discovers what he is really taking to the Indians.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man and a woman shoot an already dead man in a back alley making it look as if she shot him in self defense. Josh Randall arrives in Lordsville looking for Vic Warsaw, a killer he has been trailing. The sheriff informs Randall that Warsaw was shot and killed and has just been buried. Josh discovers that the man was shot by Lucy Fremont, the town seamstress. After investigating Warsaw's personal effects Josh begins to suspect that Vic Warsaw may still be alive.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Sitter Downers, Goofs And Saddles, Cookoo Cavaliers, Busy Buddies, G.i. Wanna Go Home, Phony Express
programme.desc: "Marriage isn't all bliss as Larry, Moe and Curly find out when they set up house with Corabell, Florabell, and Dorabell. You could call them the Dumbbells. , The stakes are higher than ever when the Stooges ante up to play poker with General muster's nemesis, Longhorn Pete. , Set in the old west, the Stooges are three tramps wanted for vagrancy. After ruining a medicine peddlers show, they arrive in Peaceful Gulch where a picture has been printed declaring them to be three famous lawmen coming to clean up the town. Assigned to guard the bank, the boys have the local gang scared at first, but when the gang learns who the Stooges really are, they rob the bank. The boys go in pursuit, find the bad guy's hideout, subdue the bandits and recover the money. , The Stooges are three fish peddlers who, looking for a new business opportunity, open a beauty salon south of the border. Their first customers are some chorus girls from a local nightclub. After the Stooges completely ruin the girl's hair, and their manager finds out, the boys must leave on the run. , The Stooges run a small restaurant, and must come up with some quick money to pay off a pie dealer whose wares they ruined. They enter Curly in a milking contest at the county fair, but his technique leaves something to be desired, and he quickly falls behind the champ. Moe and try to help by putting on a cow suit and pouring milk from a concealed bottle, but when their cheating is exposed, they must leave on the run. , The Stooges are discharged from the army and go to see their fiancées, but find they have been dispossessed and the wedding is off until they find a home. The boys have trouble finding a vacant apartment so they set up housekeeping in a vacant lot. Their housing problems seem to be solved until a farmer destroys their new home with a tractor. The Stooges then build a house of their own, but the girls aren't impressed with the one room mansion and walk out on them. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A famed herpetologist bends the laws of nature experimenting with the transformation of man into snake."

programme.title: House of Svengoolie
programme.desc: "An alien and a teenager in love must save the Earth before it becomes the food source for giant lobsters."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: When Catwoman terrorizes the fashion world, Batman and Robin rely on Batgirl's help to stop her, only to find she's been captured herself.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Dr. Smith, Will and the Robot are accidentally launched in the space pod. They land on a planet that is controlled by an alien machine that creates illusions that confuse the visitors.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The Seaview follows a natural underground conduit leading to Loch Ness, where a scientist claims to have seen a monster kill several men.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: The Earthlings help a tramp who is framed for murder by a photographer.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In 1885 Arizona, aliens force Tony and Doug to help them deplete the Earth's protein foodstuffs.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A bombing and a suspicious man leads Vincent to question an official with possible alien connections.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "A mysterious ring brings a connection to Matt's home planet and a threat to his life."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: The Bayside girls fall for a new substitute teacher, making the guys, especially Zack, jealous.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: A zit threatens Kelly's attempt at homecoming queen, but Screech's secret cream may help—or cause disastrous effects!

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.sub-title: The Mamas And The Papas (s2, ep)
programme.desc: As a class project, the Bayside gang pairs up for mock weddings, but problems arise when Lisa becomes allergic to Screech, her mock husband.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: When Kelly breaks her arm, the gang helps take care of her baby brother.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Confident of Bayside's winning streak, Zack bets on a wrestling match, only to find that Slater's quit the team and has been replaced with Screech!

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: After discovering she is failing in science class, Kelly is tutored by Screech, and soon develops a crush on him.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Carol is out of town visiting her sick aunt when Alice sprains her ankle, leaving Mike and the kids to fend for themselves. Meanwhile, Alice's boyfriend Sam wonders whether or not he should take someone else to the upcoming Meatcutters' Ball.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: A claustrophobic Jan can't seem to find any place to be alone in the Brady house and pines to be an only child. The others oblige, and give her all the space she needs, but she didn't count on the loneliness.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie feels that he doesn't have enough privacy, so he decides to move in with Chuck. He quickly discovers, though, that bachelor life isn't quite what he expected.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley find themselves in a jam when they take a bus to a distant city to visit two medical students.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayor Stoner declares the town's marching band a disgrace and refuses to allocate money for its annual trip to the state competition. Andy takes matters into his own hands, with help from Bobby Fleet and his Band with a Beat.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes have a hard time finding accommodations that will please everyone on their trip to California. They finally hit a greasy restaurant where stale cheese sandwiches cost them a dollar apiece. Hoping to find something better elsewhere, Ricky pays the check. The couples leave—only to return several hours later, fooled by some purposely misleading road signs.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward receives an antique pipe as a gift from Fred Rutherford and a curious Larry and Beaver decide to try it out. First they use coffee but then they try tobacco. When Ward discovers someone has used the pipe, he jumps to the conclusion that Wally is the culprit.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally needs a new suit for an upcoming dance and he convinces his parents that he's old enough to pick out his own clothes. So he and Beaver go down to the shop and pick out the loudest, cheapest plaid suit in the entire shop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts don’t have success with the gorilla they took out of the zoo, they decide to get Herby back. They contact Drysdale who tells Mr. Kelly, but he refuses to do it. Mr. Kelly tells Drysdale he’ll return on his own terms and has Drysdale buy him designer clothes and expensive food. Herby returns to the mansion and starts living the life of luxury, dancing and dining with Elly by the pool.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is feuding with the Beverly Hills Smog Commission because they tell her she has to stop making her lye soap. Commissioner Tinsley visits the mansion, ordering Granny to quit her soap making, and when she sees him, she threatens him with her shotgun. Jed and Granny visit Drysdale’s office for some help, where Jane tells them they should try to defeat Tinsley on Election Day, and Jed mistakes this as being told he should run.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: A crate that washes ashore contains a top secret plastic explosive developed by the U.S. Government.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: King Killiwani and two other natives come to the island looking for a "White Goddess."

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When Bubba enrolls in night school, the family convinces Mama to join him and earn her high school equivalency diploma.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.sub-title: Zirconias Are A Girl's Best Friend (s4, ep)
programme.desc: When Mama becomes hooked on television shopping, the family tries to rid her of the addiction with a hysterical form of aversion therapy.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: Model Marriage / This Year's Model / Original Sin / Vogue Rogue / Too Clothes For Comfort (part 1)
programme.desc: "A married pair of model agency owners clash over the use of one of their models has captured the captain's eye; Julie becomes a showstopper when she models in place of her beautiful model friend who has fallen in love; a cosmetics king searches for a unique woman to represent his new product; the daughter of a clothing manufacturer loses his latest line with the help of the man she loves."

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Madeline Grayson, a rich widow that Floyd has been "pen-palling" with, announces in her next letter that she wants to meet him face-to-face. Of course, the whole time Floyd has been pretending in his letters to be a wealthy entrepreneur.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "As the proud owner of more than 7000 toys and action figures--mostly in perfect condition-our collector Seth, needed somehere to store them and so he built Toyland - his backyard shed filled with toys from almost every toyline and every TV show from the 70's & 80's. Planet of the Apes figures, superheroes and the Six Million Dollar Man figures, are just a few of the toys Seth shows us today. Joining us at Toyland is John, a toy store owner who knows his toylines, and has the unenviable task of appraising Seth's entire collection and then trying to convince him to trade a relic from his past, for some forward thinking toys that John's hoping Seth can't refuse."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th faces a sleepless night as Charles's snoring keeps B.J. and Hawkeye from counting sheep. Meanwhile, Colonel Potter discovers that his son-in-law, Bob Wilson, has had an affair.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A military strategist refuses to accept responsibility for the war games that have mortally wounded his own son. And Margaret develops laryngitis, as she is about to meet her hero, Dr. Chesler.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith and Archie rush Stephanie to the hospital for an emergency appendectomy on the eve of her 10th birthday. Luckily, the surgery goes perfectly, so they celebrate both Stephanie's birthday and the success of her operation.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie and Edith are shocked when they discover that Stephanie has been stealing some of her favorite teacher's (and the Bunkers') belongings. But Stephanie admits that she stole these things so that when she returns to her dad's, she'll have something to remember them by.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Barney Hefner is suicidal when Blanche finally deserts him, until Archie fixes him up with an overweight but wealthy widow.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Archie's brother, Fred, visits Archie to open up a business, he also brings his 18 year old wife, Katherine. Both, Archie and Edith, and even Stephanie, are shocked as they find out. While the new bride and Edith cook supper, Archie and Fred argue about Katherine's age. Before dinner, Fred (and Katherine) leave the Bunker's home, canceling the business. In bed, Edith asks Archie if he were a single 55 year old man, would he go for a young girl. Archie answers no.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Business Lunch, The / Mrs. Wiggins / Oldest Man, The
programme.desc: In The Business Lunch, a strictly-professional Harvey proposes a business merger to Carol aka marriage. Then, in Mrs. Wiggins, Mr. Tudball fights the coffee machine. Finally, in The Oldest Man, a hurried man goes to his butcher, the Oldest Man.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Mama and Eunice battle it out over charades. Then, in Take My Drink, Carol spills her guts to a wise-cracking bartender.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob tells his co-workers about the day he and Laura met a prisoner.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail: Part 2
programme.desc: "The Alan Brady Show" perform in prison, and Rob accidently ends up behind bars.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph and Ed play pool with Ralph's boss and Ed gets a job at the bus company.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After her mean-spirited uncle dies, an old maid inherits the crotchety inventor's estate, with the stipulation that she cares for his latest invention, a robot.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: Two business executives throw themselves into a battle of wits and trickery as they compete for a gorgeous lady.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ramon Prado, a narcotics dealer, has stolen half of a microfilm containing a list of undercover agents. His rival, Arturo Sandoval, has the other half. The two men are trying to work out a truce to combine their two halves and sell the list.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: While working as a research technician for the wealthy Allan Pruitt, Kimble gets involved in the business of Allan's teenage daughter, Janice, who returns home after spending a year in a mental hospital recovering from a nervous breakdown after witnessing

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry O commits himself to and becomes trapped in a mental institution when he struggles to rescue a strange young woman from a murderous plot to steal her inheritance."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot while making a routine check on a pair of paroled convicts parked near a liquor store.
